case_title: CIRIOL ORELLANA VS. EUROMINDDESIGNCORP., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ORELLANA, CIRIOL AS TO DEFENDANT EUROMINDDESIGNCORP., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ORELLANA, CIRIOL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EUROMINDDESIGNCORP., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $38,347.61 PRINCIPAL, $1,132.01 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $39,929.62, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
